entryRequirements.visaNote: Visa Waiver Program covers 40+ countries for tourism up to 90 days, but requires an approved ESTA obtained in advance online. Other nationalities need a B1/B2 visa.
entryRequirements.officialSource: U.S. Customs and Border Protection / ESTA official site

transportInfo.paymentCard: OMNY (tap-to-pay with bank card, phone, or OMNY card — MetroCard fully phased out as of end of 2025)
transportInfo.note: OMNY has weekly fare capping built in — 12 rides in 7 days and the rest of that week is free, so no need to buy a separate weekly pass.

majorEventsNote: Thanksgiving week (including the Macy's Parade) and New Year's Eve in Times Square are the two biggest tourist-impact events — book well ahead and expect major street closures.
